title: Resolution of Stressed Assets Directions, 2025 - Amendment on Specified Non-Financial Assets (SNFAs)
description: <cite index="11-3">The RBI issued final prudential norms for banks, small finance banks (SFBs) and non-banking financial companies (NBFCs), prohibiting them from selling specified non-financial assets (SNFAs) acquired during the resolution of stressed loans back to the defaulting borrower or its related parties.</cite> <cite index="11-5">The new norms will come into effect from October 1, 2026.</cite> <cite index="11-10,11-11">SNFAs must be recorded at lower of net book value or distress sale value, and lenders must make efforts to dispose through public auctions following SARFAESI Act principles.</cite>
